title: Psychology
description: A social science major focused on behavior, cognition, mental processes, and human development.

title: Sociology
description: Studies groups, institutions, culture, inequality, and how social structures shape human life.

title: Political Science
description: Examines government systems, political behavior, public policy, international relations, and civic power.

title: History
description: Explores past events, societies, movements, and the forces that shaped the modern world.

title: Anthropology
description: Focuses on human societies, cultures, evolution, and the study of people across time and place.

title: Education Studies
description: Prepares students to understand learning, teaching, curriculum, and the systems that support education.

title: Criminology
description: Analyzes crime, justice systems, law enforcement, and social factors related to public safety.
